attacking_style: Launches solo, long-range attacks on final categorized climbs, particularly effective on steep gradients (10-16% ramps). Prefers attacking from breakaways rather than GC groups, typically going alone rather than waiting for sprint finishes.
team_tactics: DSM placed multiple riders (3+) in early breakaways to create numerical advantage, allowing Storer to conserve energy by skipping pulls when teammates present. However, 2023 showed declining team support for his KOM jersey defense.
terrain_preference: Excels on steep, punchy final climbs with sustained 10-16% gradients. Thrives in breakaway scenarios on mountain stages where he can isolate rivals through superior climbing on extreme gradients.
vulnerability: Requires breakaway scenarios and team numerical advantage; isolated in chase groups without proper support (2023 Vuelta). Descending may be a weakness (crashed on descent despite winning in 2021).
key_patterns: Attacks solo from breakaways on final climb, not waiting for group sprint (3 instances)
Dominates KOM sprints within breakaways, tactical focus on mountains classification (2 instances)
Exploits teammates in breakaway to skip work before solo acceleration (2 instances)
Thrives on extreme gradients 14-16%, separates rivals on steepest ramps (2 instances)
Lost team support between 2021-2023, moved from protected status to isolated (2 years compared)
form_trajectory: negative: 2023 Vuelta showed him isolated in chase groups rather than breakaways, lacking the team support that enabled his 2021 stage wins and KOM success
